summary: The diff implements most of the required features: sign-up/login screen (REQ-1), draggable mascot (REQ-2), plant info board with typewriter animation and Web Speech API TTS (REQ-3), and references to static image assets (REQ-4, REQ-5). However, the actual static image files are not present in the diff — only referenced. The sign-up screen has a minor gap: it does not implement a returning user login flow. The backend correctly adds the Identifier type and saveCallerUserProfile.

missing_requirements.requirement: Returning users can log back in with the same identifier.
missing_requirements.reason: The SignUpScreen only handles new profile creation (calls saveCallerUserProfile). There is no lookup/login path for returning users by their stored Gmail or phone identifier. App.tsx simply shows SignUpScreen when profile is null, but there is no mechanism for a user who already has a profile to re-authenticate with their identifier.

missing_requirements.requirement: An anime chibi character image is available as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated (anime-mascot.dim_256x512.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff references the image path /assets/generated/anime-mascot.dim_256x512.png in DraggableMascot.tsx, but no actual image file is added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: A chalkboard/wooden board image is available as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated (plant-board.dim_400x300.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff references /assets/generated/plant-board.dim_400x300.png in PlantInfoBoard.tsx, but no actual image file is added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated migration module (backend/migration.mo) for upgrading old user profiles to include the new Identifier field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not ask for a migration module or data migration strategy. It only required storing the identifier in the backend for new sign-ups.

hallucinated_features.description: Local storage fallback for anonymous users with points and discoveries stored in localStorage when actor is unavailable.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request made no mention of local storage fallback or anonymous user support. This logic was added to useQueries.ts beyond what was requested.
